milestones.title: Level Start
milestones.description: The game begins with the iconic 'Ready... Set... Plant!' announcement, marking the start of the level and the player's defense preparation.

milestones.title: First Economic Setup
milestones.description: The player plants the first Sunflower. This is a crucial initial step to establish the sun economy required to purchase defensive plants.

milestones.title: First Defensive Action
milestones.description: The player plants the first Peashooter to counter the initial approaching zombie, establishing the first line of defense.

milestones.title: Countering Buckethead Zombie
milestones.description: A Buckethead Zombie (high defense enemy) enters. The player strategically plants a Wall-nut to block its path, buying time for the offensive plants to defeat it.

milestones.title: Huge Wave Event
milestones.description: The warning text 'A huge wave of zombies is approaching!' appears, signaling the climax of the level where a large number of enemies spawn simultaneously.

milestones.title: Level Complete & Shovel Unlocked
milestones.description: The final zombie is defeated and a Shovel item appears. The player collects it, completing the level and unlocking the ability to dig up plants.
